titleStmt.title: SII 31.69: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 69. (A.R. No. B 311 of 1938.) NĒKUNĀMPĒṬA JAMMALMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab on the bank of the river Pennār, near the ruined temple of Saṅgamēśvara.
This record is dated Śaka 1448, Vyaya, Āshāḍha, śu. 11 corresponding to June 20, Wednesday, 1526 A.D.

It registers the gift of land with tax-free situated between the villages of Gaṇḍlūru and Chaviṭapalle (boundaries specified) on the day of prathama-ēkādasi to the god Saṅgamēśvara at Kūḍali by Aṁnājiyya, the son of Sarvvakratu-vājapēyayāji. Virūpāksha Dīkshita of the Āpastaṁba sūtra and Gārgēya-gōtra. The gifted land is stated to have been situated in the Gaṁḍikōṭa-sīma, the nāyaṁkara of Dēmmarasu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . jayādbhu(bhyu)
daya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1448 Agunēṁṭi vyayasaṁvvatsara
Āṣāḍha śu 11 lu Īpuṇyakālamaṁdurājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrakṛṣṇarāyamahārā
yalu pṛdhivini sāṁmrārājyaṁ cēyucunu [Uṁ]nna
Avasaraṁ dēmarusayyavāri nā
yaṁkrānaku cēllē ghaṁḍikōṭamā
¨rggānacellēguṁḍlūri puttaraṁcevi
ṭipallegrāmānnu tū¨rpunacina
timmepallipōlaṁ vāmanu kuṁṭi
paḍamaragaṁḍlūru caviṭapalle Iraṁ
ḍḍugrāmālamuṁnnu kūḍali Īnaḍigaḍa
polamu catussīmūnu kūḍali
saṁgamēśvaradēvunki gā¨rgayagō
traṁ Āpastaṁbha(ba)sūtraṁ sa¨rvakratuvā
japēyādi virūpākṣadīkṣitulapu
truṁḍu Āṁnājayavāru Iccinabhū
dāna dha¨rmma śāsanaṁ gā¨rgēyagōtraṁ
Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ sa¨rvavājapē
yādi virūpākṣa dīkṣituluputru
ḍu Aṁnājayavāru kūḍali saṁ
gamēśvaradēvuni Ā gaḍacēnistalaṁ
pradhamayākādaśi mahākālamaṁdu
Amṛtapaḷaku dhāravōsi Istimi . gā¨rga
yagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbha(ba)sūtaṁ� sa
¨rva kratu vājapēyādi virūpākṣadīkṣitulapu
truḍu Anājiyyavāru kūḍali saṁga
mēśvaruniki yiṁddugala nidhinikṣēpa ja
la pāṣāṇa Akṣiṇa Āgāmi siddhasādhyā
mulaneḍi Aṣṭabhōgasvāmyalu saṁga
mēśvaruniki sahiraṇyōdaka dā
nadhārāpū¨rvakamugāIstimi . svadattaṁ
ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ para pālanaṁ para
dattāpahārēṇa saṁbhavē
damaged
